translations.en: "Ah, $G $P! A sailor from Britain said thou had returned to the land!"
translations.zh: 「啊，$G $P！一名來自不列顛城的水手說汝已回到此地！」

translations.en: "How glad I am to see that it is true!"
"I'm Tessa. We met during thy last quest, Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「吾乃泰莎。汝上次試煉時，我們曾相逢，聖者！」

translations.en: "Strange that thou didst not recognize me."
"I would have hoped that the past years had not taken that much toll on me!"
translations.zh: 「吾本以為這些歲月並未在我臉上留下太深的痕跡！」

translations.en: "I'm the keeper of the Flame of @Courage."
"I also help my husband @Simon run this town."
"How fortunate we were to come here after the @earthquake!"
translations.zh: 「那場@earthquake之後，我們得以來到此地，真是萬幸！」

translations.en: "He is the lord of this hold."
You'll find many courageous fighters here!"
translations.zh: 汝將在此遇見許多英勇的戰士！」
translations.note: 注意：原文缺開引號，照原樣

translations.en: "After thy last quest, there were many great earthquakes."
translations.zh: 「汝上次試煉之後，發生了多場大地震。」

translations.en: "The island of Bordermarch sank into the sea, along with our keep!"
translations.zh: 「邊境島沉入海底，連同我們的堡壘一同消失！」

translations.en: "Only through great fortune did Simon and I make it off the island alive!"
translations.zh: 「全憑上天庇佑，賽門與我才能活著離開那座島！」

translations.en: "Farewell, Avatar! Be brave in thy quest!"
translations.zh: 「再見，聖者！試煉之途，鼓勇前行！」

translator_notes: Tessa 為泰莎，賽門之妻，巨蛇堡女主人。語氣溫暖熱情。offset 608 原文缺起始引號，照源文保留。@Courage/@earthquake/@Simon 保留 keyword 觸發。
